zh.lifeSummary: 當Catrin ferch Dafydd於大約1255年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾德爾維時，她的父親Dafydd ap Gruffudd32歲，母親Gwenhwyfar ferch Tudur32歲。她於1300年與Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd在英國威爾斯福林爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Catrin ferch Dafydd was born about 1255, in Gwyddelwern, Merionethshire, Wales, her father, Dafydd ap Gruffudd, was 32 and her mother, Gwenhwyfar ferch Tudur, was 32. She married Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd in 1300, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catrin ferch Dafydd est née environ 1255, à Gwyddelwern, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Dafydd ap Gruffudd, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gwenhwyfar ferch Tudur, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd en 1300, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille.

Sie hat 1300 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

ja.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Dafyddが約1255年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアグウイッドエルウエルンで生まれた時，父Dafydd ap Gruffuddは32歳，母Gwenhwyfar ferch Tudurは32歳であった。1300年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアでBleddyn ap Ithel Llwydと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Dafydd(이)가 대략 1255년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 그w이데워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd ap Gruffudd(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenhwyfar ferch Tudur(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catrin ferch Dafydd родилась около 1255 г. в местности гвидделвирн, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Dafydd ap Gruffudd было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenhwyfar ferch Tudur, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd в 1300 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь.

Se casó con Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd en 1300, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
